note: Sharp cliff; TPS collapses steeply beyond saturation — use fine steps near peak to avoid overshooting
Gradual slope; coarse bracketing is safe for initial sweep, refine once bounded
Gradual slope; lower ceiling than 16p due to increased gossip overhead
Gradual slope; endorsement propagation cost dominates at this scale
Large network; fine steps always safe — saturation ceiling is low and unpredictable
